Warrant Discharged
MISDEMEANOR PLEA TX FILED

Q/CAL: SENTENCING; STRAIGHT COUNTY JAIL TIME/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO SENTENCE DEFENDANT TO STRAIGHT COUNTY JAIL TIME IN LIEU OF PROBATION IN THIS CASE,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER AS TO THE STAY AWAY ORDER AND RESTITUTION, ANY STAY AWAY ORDER AND RESTITUTION FROM THIS CASE MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 16006694,/TWS/CH3:CJ 180D/CTS: 180/4019HALF/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THERIGHT TO REINSTATE/
